/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_nrppa.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/nrppa_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/nrppa_helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/nrppa_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/du_context/nrppa_du_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/meas_context/nrppa_meas_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/procedures/e_cid_measurement_initiation_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/procedures/e_cid_measurement_termination_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/procedures/measurement_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/procedures/trp_information_exchange_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/procedures/positioning_information_exchange_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/procedures/positioning_activation_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_nrppa.dir/ue_context/nrppa_ue_context.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_nrppa.a
